scene_input.scene_summary: Bilal leaves the mosque, feeling inspired to practice kindness.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Bilal walks out of the mosque

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 265
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of practicing kindness and compassion in our daily lives.

characters.name: The Prophet
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: Bilal
characters.appearance: slender young man with a gentle smile, wearing a simple white thobe and a white cloth head covering

schema_output.narrative_text: Bilal walked out of the mosque, feeling inspired to practice kindness. He remembered the words of the Prophet, "A smile is a charity".
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. Late afternoon sunlight filters through the wooden lattice windows of a modest 7th century Makkah mosque, casting warm rays across the interior. The floor is made of cool, dark grey stone, and the walls are adorned with simple white and beige geometric patterns. In the center of the room, a tall, majestic figure is seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades. In the doorway, a slender young woman with a gentle smile, wearing a simple white thobe and a white cloth head covering, walks out of the mosque with a sense of hope and purpose. Her right hand is extended in front of her, and her head is held high, as if she is walking towards a brighter future. Soft warm golden light, intimate and sacred mood. Medium close shot at eye level. Warm sand, cream, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
